title: Google的Prompt API
summary: 本文介绍了Google推出的Prompt API，这是一个用于与大型语言模型交互的标准化接口，旨在简化提示工程和模型调用流程。该API支持多轮对话、上下文管理和输出格式化，为开发者提供了更高效的AI应用构建方式。The article introduces Google's Prompt API, a standardized interface for interacting with large language models, designed to simplify prompt engineering and model invocation workflows. It supports multi-turn conversations, context management, and output formatting, providing developers with a more efficient way to build AI applications.
